nws.name: Overnight
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers. Cloudy. Low around 36, with temperatures rising to around 41 overnight. South southwest wind 25 to 30 mph, with gusts as high as 55 mph. Chance of precipitation is 80%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Rain And Snow Showers then Partly Sunny
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of rain showers before 7am, then a slight chance of rain and snow showers between 7am and 10am. Partly sunny. High near 45, with temperatures falling to around 43 in the afternoon. West southwest wind 30 to 35 mph, with gusts as high as 60 mph. Chance of precipitation is 20%. New rainfall amounts less than a tenth of an inch possible.

nws.name: Friday Night
nws.detailedForecast: Partly cloudy, with a low around 31. Northwest wind 5 to 25 mph, with gusts as high as 40 mph.

nws.name: Saturday
nws.detailedForecast: A chance of snow showers after 7am. Cloudy, with a high near 41. East wind 5 to 10 mph, with gusts as high as 20 mph. Chance of precipitation is 30%.

nws.name: Saturday Night
nws.shortForecast: Slight Chance Snow Showers then Rain And Snow Showers Likely
nws.detailedForecast: A slight chance of snow showers before 7pm, then a chance of rain and snow showers between 7pm and 10pm, then rain and snow showers likely. Cloudy, with a low around 36. East southeast wind around 15 mph, with gusts as high as 25 mph. Chance of precipitation is 70%.

nws.name: Sunday
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers likely before 1pm, then showers and thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 60. Chance of precipitation is 90%.

nws.shortForecast: Rain Showers then Rain And Snow Showers
nws.detailedForecast: Rain showers before 1am, then rain and snow showers. Cloudy, with a low around 22. New snow accumulation of 1 to 2 inches possible.

nws.name: Monday
